name: Rosti I
recipeIngredient: salt, pepper and nutmeg -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions and potatoes in a colander to dry and then squeeze the mixture between your hands to get out as much liquid as possible.
2. Mix the shredded potatoes, chopped onions, diced bacon, and seasonings (salt, pepper, and nutmeg) together.
3. Heat the butter in a pan until it becomes foamy and swirl it around to coat the pan evenly.
4. Lay the potato mixture into the hot pan and press down firmly to form an even cake.
5. Turn the heat down and cook for 30 minutes, covered, shaking the pan often, until the potatoes are golden brown on the bottom.
6. Spread the remaining butter over the top of the rosti and bake in a preheated oven for another 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and turn the heat to broil. Cook for an additional minute or two until the top is golden brown.
